headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Monolithic Power Systems, Lowers Price Target to $1700
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ:MPWR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $1860 to $1700.
